name: cinatra-foundation
description: Cinatra public foundation Claude Code plugin — the shared environment skills (setup, onboarding, cinatra-dev-tools, extension-conventions, domain-gotchas), the extension-development pack (extension-authoring lifecycle, per-kind specialists, extension-boundary doctrine, and the /cinatra-extension-new + /cinatra-extension-verify commands), plus the deterministic dev-tools CLI engine. Install once; skills activate on natural-language triggers. Apache-2.0.
